task_prompt: Run all R scripts in the 'code' folder
tasks: From the replicated penalized multinomial logistic regression with 4 outcome categories (Figure 2), what is the p-value for the effect of auto-braking assistance on unilateral turns relative to bilateral turns for the control group? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.

From the replicated penalized multinomial logistic regression with 4 outcome categories (Figure 2), what is the p-value for the main effect of messaging on unilateral turns relative to bilateral turns? Report only the number rounded to four decimal places.

From the replicated OLS regression predicting satisfaction with the counterpart (Figure 5), what is the p-value for the effect of the number of times the counterpart went straight? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
